chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.91 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs Disposed of matter 1. For orders on M.A. No.3934/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on M.A. No.3935/2026 (Return of surety) ----------------------------------------------------- 12.03.2026 Mr. Abdul Waheed, advocate for applicant/surety Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, A.P.G. ------------------------------------- Along with urgent application, applicant/surety has moved application for return of surety. It appears that protective bail was granted to applicants Andal Shujrah son of Muhammad Mehar and Pathan Khan alias Muhammad Pathan son of Muhammad Mehar Shujrah by this Court vide order dated 13.01.2026, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- each and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. As per Nazir’s endorsement one Abdul Samad Nagori son of Muhammad Aslam furnished surety by way of depositing cash amount Rs.100,000/- for both the applicants. Learned counsel applicant/surety submits that after grant of protective both the applicants surrendered before learned Additional Sessions Judge-III Shikarpur and were granted bail before arrest vide order dated 21.01.2026. Certified copy of vide order dated 21.01.2026 has been placed on record, hence the surety furnished in the instant criminal bail application is no more required. Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, A.P.G. present in Court in some other cases, waives notice and after having gone through the case file and aforesaid order has recorded his no objection for return of surety. In view of above, surety furnished by the applicant/ surety is no more required.

Sharafuddin Kanhar, A.P.G. present in Court in some other cases, waives notice and after having gone through the case file and aforesaid order has recorded his no objection for return of surety. In view of above, surety furnished by the applicant/ surety is no more required. Application for return of surety is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety to the applicant/surety upon proper verification and identification, as per rules. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
